netWorth.title: Net Worth
netWorth.description: Your assets, investments and loans in one place

summary.noteNegative: You owe more than you own — paying down loans lifts this.
summary.noteEmpty: Add accounts, holdings or loans to see your net worth.
summary.notePositive: Your assets comfortably cover what you owe.

overview.emptyDesc: Add savings, investments or spend a little this month to see your money map.
overview.moneyMapNote: Expenditure is this month's spending; Saving & Investment are current balances.

assets.noAccounts: No accounts counted in your total.
assets.emptyTitle: No investments or savings linked yet
assets.emptyDesc: Add deposits, funds, stocks, gold or property so your net worth reflects everything you own.

liabilities.emptyDesc: You have no active loans. Track a loan to see it reduce your net worth here.
liabilities.shareDesc: Each loan's share of the {{total}} you owe.

trend.title: Net worth over time
trend.emptyDesc: We record one net-worth point each day you open this page. Check back over the coming days to watch it grow.

loansPage.title: Loans
loansPage.description: Track balances and plan an early payoff
loansPage.emptyDesc: Add your loans to track outstanding balances and plan an early payoff.

loanOverview.emptyDesc: All your loans are marked closed — nothing outstanding. 🎉
loanOverview.interestRemainingHelp: Interest you'll still pay if you keep paying the current EMI at the current rate until each loan closes. Assumes no prepayments or rate changes.
loanOverview.outstandingShareDesc: Each loan's share of the {{total}} total outstanding.
loanOverview.payoffProgressDesc: % paid of each loan's original principal.
loanOverview.leftAddOriginal: {{left}} left · add the original amount to see % paid

preclose.title: Preclose · {{name}}
preclose.desc: Pay off the full balance now and close the loan. Banks usually charge a foreclosure fee.

loanForm.clearsInPost: . Linking a recurring EMI updates this automatically as it's paid.
loanForm.emiTooLowLong: the EMI doesn't cover the monthly interest — the balance won't reduce.

holdingForm.namePlaceholder: e.g. HDFC FD / Nifty index fund / Gold coins
holdingForm.enterEitherPost: the interest rate or the maturity value — the other is calculated for you from the dates.
holdingForm.addGrowthDetails: + Add deposit / growth details (rate, maturity, gain)

planner.title: Early payoff planner · {{name}}
planner.notFeasible: The EMI doesn't cover the monthly interest, so the balance never reduces. Increase the EMI (or check the rate) to see a payoff estimate.
planner.prepaymentChargeOnLump: Prepayment charge (%) on the lump sum
planner.chargeHelp: Defaults to this loan's rate. Floating-rate home, personal & education loans are usually 0% (RBI); car, business & fixed-rate loans are typically 2–5%.
planner.notWorth: The charge outweighs the interest saved — prepaying this lump sum may cost more than it saves.
planner.estimateNote: Reducing-balance estimate. The charge applies to the lump sum only (lenders may add 18% GST); actual figures depend on your lender's schedule.
